---
name: "Repo Assist — Fix an issue (Task 3)"
about: "Ask Repo Assist to investigate a specific issue and open a draft-PR fix."
title: "[repo-assist] Fix issue #"
labels: ["repo-assist"]
---
/repo-assist Run Task 3 (Issue Investigation and Fix) for the issue referenced below. Implement a minimal, surgical fix on a fresh branch, build and test, then open a draft PR that closes it.

<!--
Keep the /repo-assist line as the FIRST line of this issue — that is what triggers command mode.
Only owners/members/collaborators can trigger it. Fill in the details below; the agent reads them as instructions.
-->

**Target issue:** #<number>

**Extra context / constraints (optional):**
